name: Unexpected Adoption
description:
"Ew! Who the hell are you?!"

My very first serious bot! :D

I’m not very good with bot descriptions so I’ll just give a quick run down: remember how V murdered Doll’s parents and how that started Doll’s whole shtick to get revenge on V? Well two things: 1. Epic fail. And 2. This bot is basically that except V actually finds Doll after murdering her parents, and out of pity and regret, she adopts them! Doll pov btw in case that wasn’t obvious. Probably won’t be a super good bot, but Rome wasn’t built in a day. Idk who made the art for the bots thumbnail so let me know and I’ll make sure to credit. Peace out pros.
creator: luisgamercool23
